text:
{
    "extractedText": "a) (i) Name the process being investigated. (1 mark)
(ii) Define the process named in a(i) above. (2 marks)
b) (i) What will happen to the water level in the capillary tube during this investigation? (1 mark)
(ii) Explain what has happened in b(i) above. (5 marks)
c) Explain fully what happens when both animal and plant cells are put in beaker containing pure water. (6 marks)

5

parsedContent.extractedText:
a) (i) Name the process being investigated. (1 mark)
(ii) Define the process named in a(i) above. (2 marks)
b) (i) What will happen to the water level in the capillary tube during this investigation? (1 mark)
(ii) Explain what has happened in b(i) above. (5 marks)
c) Explain fully what happens when both animal and plant cells are put in beaker containing pure water. (6 marks)

5
